---
title: q.dataset Roadmap
---

No open work is currently listed. The initial dataset lifecycle now includes
strict index or named-key assembly, optional named partitions, fixed temporal
partitions, sklearn-backed expanding and rolling folds, dataset-bound fold
facades, label-horizon purging, row/session and timedelta embargoes,
persistence, diagnostics, leakage audits, and split-aware transformation
pipelines.
